scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/config build && corepack pnpm --parallel --filter @lobby/shared --filter @lobby/config --filter @lobby/api --filter @lobby/web dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/config build && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/web lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/config build && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/api exec tsc --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/web exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/api exec prisma migrate dev --schema ../../prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: corepack pnpm --filter @lobby/api exec prisma migrate deploy --schema ../../prisma/schema.prisma
